title: chrysanthemum × stipulaceum
intro: Chrysanthemum × stipulaceum, also known as Korean chrysanthemum or mugunghwa, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum × stipulaceum include its ability to soothe the mind and body, lower blood pressure, and improve respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
